label: The Dead Sea embodies a unique form of wrongness characterized by absence and the failure to support life, distinct from the wrongness of accumulation seen in the protagonist's father's house.
evidence_text: There was something wrong about the Dead Sea. Not wrong in the way his father's house was wrong—that was a wrongness of accumulation, of life refusing to move forward. This was different. This was the wrongness of absence. Of a place where the normal rules didn't apply, where even the water had given up on the idea of supporting life.

evidence.quote: There was something wrong about the Dead Sea. Not wrong in the way his father's house was wrong—that was a wrongness of accumulation, of life refusing to move forward. This was different. This was the wrongness of absence. Of a place where the normal rules didn't apply, where even the water had given up on the idea of supporting life.

interpretation: This observation highlights a central motif contrasting two types of wrongness: one of stasis and accumulation, the other of absence and lifelessness.

observation.summary: The Dead Sea embodies a unique form of wrongness characterized by absence and the failure to support life, distinct from the wrongness of accumulation seen in the protagonist's father's house.
